{{short description|None}} {{nihongo|'''Jingū'''|神宮}} is a name for a [[Shinto shrine]] connected to the [[Imperial House of Japan]]. ==List of ''Jingū'' == The following list encompasses only some, but not all of the [[Heian period]] ''Nijūnisha'' shrines ([[Twenty-Two Shrines]]); and the modern shrines which were established after the [[Meiji Restoration]] are not omitted. In the list below, these shrines are marked with "'''‡'''". {{dynamic list}} * [[Ise Jingu]] * [[Akama Jingu]] * [[Atsuta Jingu]] * [[Heian Jingu]]‡ * [[Hikosan Jingū|Hikosan Jingu]] * [[Hinokuma Jingu]] * [[Hokkaidō Jingū|Hokkaidō Jingu]] * [[Isonokami Jingu]] * [[Izanagi Jingu]]‡ * [[Kagoshima Jingu]] * [[Kashihara Jingu]] * [[Kashima Jingū|Kashima Jingu]] * [[Katori jingu|Katori Jingu]] * [[Kehi Jingu]] * [[Kirishima Jingū|Kirishima Jingu]] * [[Meiji Jingu]]‡ * [[Minase Jingu]] * [[Miyazaki Jingū|Miyazaki Jingu]] * [[Ōmi Jingū|Omi Jingu]] * [[Shiramine Jingū]] * [[Udo Jingū|Udo Jingu]] * [[Usa Jingū|Usa Jingu]] * [[Yoshino Jingu]] Ise Grand Shrine is also known by the formal name ''Jingū'' with no further designation. ==Defunct shrines== * [[Chōsen Jingū]] * [[Kantō Shrine|Kantō Jingū]] (extinct) * {{ill|Fuyo Jingu|ja|扶余神宮}} * [[Taiwan Jingu]] ==See also== *[[List of Shinto shrines]] *[[List of Tōshō-gū]] * {{nihongo|[[Nijūnisha]]|二十二社|twenty-two shrines}} ==Notes== claps, one bow|ja|二礼二拍手一礼|simple}} * [[Jichinsai]] }} }} {{Documentation|content={{collapsible option}} [[Category:Japan navigational boxes]] [[Category:Shinto templates|Shrines]] [[Category:Religious buildings and structures navigational boxes]] [[Category:Shinto shrines|τ]] }}

{{short description|None}}
{{nihongo|'''Jingū'''|神宮}} is a name for a [[Shinto shrine]] connected to the [[Imperial House of Japan]].
==List of ''Jingū'' ==
* [[Heian Shrine|Heian Jingu]] * [[Izanagi Shrine|Izanagi Jingu]] * [[Meiji Shrine|Meiji Jingu]] {{Navbox | name = Sarutahiko Faith | title = [[Sarutahiko Ōkami|Sarutahiko Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Sarutahiko Ōkami.crop.4.wp.working.print.png|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * [[Sarutahiko Ōkami]] * [[Ame-no-Uzume]]
|group2 = Shrines |list2 = * [[Tsubaki Grand Shrine]] * {{ill|Sarutahiko Shrine|ja|猿田彦神社|simple}} |group3 = Branch shrines |list3= * [[Shirahige Shrine]] * [[Tsubaki Grand Shrine of America]] |group4= misc |list4= * {{ill|Sarume clan|ja|猿女君}} }}<noinclude>
